description_long: This is a sleek, twin-engine propeller airplane with a streamlined fuselage and a high-mounted horizontal stabilizer. The aircraft features a low-wing configuration with straight wings and prominent pontoons, indicating it is designed as a seaplane or amphibious aircraft. The fuselage is painted white with blue-tinted windows and a distinctive logo on the tail fin. The cockpit is located at the front, with a row of circular windows along the side, suggesting a multi-seat arrangement. The landing gear consists of floats, suitable for water landings, and a single nose wheel for ground maneuvering. The propellers are mounted on the wings, and the overall design emphasizes aerodynamic efficiency and utility for both water and land operations.
description: A white, twin-propeller seaplane with blue windows, low straight wings, and large pontoons for water landings. The cockpit is forward with a row of circular windows and a distinctive tail logo.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the fuselage, blue windows, twin propellers, and large pontoons beneath the wings.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the twin engines, straight wings, and the wide stance of the pontoons.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, with clear visibility of the propellers, pontoons, and tail logo.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the cockpit windows, nose wheel, twin propellers, and the symmetry of the pontoons and wings.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing configuration with straight wings and large underwing pontoons; no visible winglets or pronounced dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_engine_type: Twin piston propeller engines mounted on the wings.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and high-mounted horizontal stabilizer.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Float landing gear with two large pontoons and a single nose wheel; fixed configuration.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with multi-seat configuration and a row of circular side windows.
